channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Only Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit (request)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit (request) Leon "Bill" Kennedy - Resident Evil 2 Remake RPD Suit Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Credits: skin - ched salvia, Casino [Leon "Bill" Kennedy - Resident Evil 2 Remake RPD Suit v2] long - Leon Bill Kennedy (Hatless Bill) vgui skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit bill.vpk (bill skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit francis.vpk (francis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit louis.vpk (Louis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit zoey.vpk (zoey skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit coach.vpk (coach skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit elliss.vpk (ellis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit nick.vpk (nick skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit (request) Leon "Bill" Kennedy - Resident Evil 2 Remake RPD Suit Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Credits: skin - ched salvia, Casino [Leon "Bill" Kennedy - Resident Evil 2 Remake RPD Suit v2] long - Leon Bill Kennedy (Hatless Bill) vgui skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit bill.vpk (bill skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit francis.vpk (francis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit louis.vpk (Louis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit zoey.vpk (zoey skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit coach.vpk (coach skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit elliss.vpk (ellis skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit nick.vpk (nick skin) Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only Leon Bill Kennedy RE2R RPD Suit.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.

item.title: [ Mod ] FN57&FN509 silence.ver (9mm pistol) v2 [Sound fix Ver, request]
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
FN57&FN509 silence.ver (9mm pistol) v2 [Sound fix Ver, request] Ready Or Not (2023) FN Five-seveN FDE (Flat Dark Earth) - 5.7x28mm FN & FN 509 FDE - 9x19mm Parabellum silence Pistol skin Skin replacement for Left 4 Dead 2 Dual pistols SIG-Sauer P220 SAO, Glock 26 scripts More add hud icon Damage increase 20 + 20 = 40 bullets sound FIX skin - sine - [FN57&FN509 silence.ver (9mm pistol) v2] sound Fix - l4dkk
item.content:encoded:
View Article

Media gallery
1 / 8
FN57&FN509 silence.ver (9mm pistol) v2 [Sound fix Ver, request] Ready Or Not (2023) FN Five-seveN FDE (Flat Dark Earth) - 5.7x28mm FN & FN 509 FDE - 9x19mm Parabellum silence Pistol skin Skin replacement for Left 4 Dead 2 Dual pistols SIG-Sauer P220 SAO, Glock 26 scripts More add hud icon Damage increase 20 + 20 = 40 bullets sound FIX skin - sine - [FN57&FN509 silence.ver (9mm pistol) v2] sound Fix - l4dkk

item.title: [ Mod ] MW19 EBR-14 (Hunting Rifle) v2 [request, Sound fix Ver]
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
MW19 EBR-14 (Hunting Rifle) v2 [request, Sound fix Ver] CALL OF DUTY: MODERN WARFARE (2019) EBR-14 [M14 rifle - 7.62x51mm NATO] Semi-automatic rifle Skin. Left 4 Dead 2 Ruger Mini-14 replacement skin. scripts More SaturnianDragon - MW2019 EBR-14 Script add hud icon 20 bullets sound edit skin - AdrianMagdanøv, Animal33 [MW19 EBR-14 (Hunting Rifle) v2] https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3677861848&searchtext=MW19+EBR-14 Port and Compile - l4dkk

item.title: [ Mod ] Only Captain America AE (request)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only Captain America AE (request) Game Avengers Endgame (2020) Captain America survivor Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Credits: skin - NESS [Captain America [Ellis] - Avengers Endgame] skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. Captain America AE bill.vpk (bill skin) Captain America AE francis.vpk (francis skin) Captain America AE Louis.vpk (Louis skin) Captain America AE Zoey.vpk (zoey skin) Captain America AE coach.vpk (coach skin) Captain America AE elliss.vpk (ellis skin) Captain America AE nick.vpk (nick skin) Captain America AE rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) only Captain America AE.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and in single player (character animations will not work in multiplayer).
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media

1 / 8

Credits: skin - NESS [Captain America [Ellis] - Avengers Endgame] skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file.
